sourcesContent:
import React, { useContext } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { AuthContext } from '../context/AuthContext'; const actionCards = [ { title: 'Book Slots', description: 'Reserve time with staff members for focused academic support.', icon: 'BK', to: '/slots', }, { title: 'Messages', description: 'Continue discussions with staff or ask quick follow-up questions.', icon: 'MS', to: '/chat', }, { title: 'Resources', description: 'Review uploaded notes, materials, and study references.', icon: 'RS', to: '/materials', }, { title: 'My Bookings', description: 'Track your scheduled sessions and upcoming learning commitments.', icon: 'MB', to: '/slots?view=booked', }, ]; const workflowItems = [ 'Review available staff schedules and select a relevant session.', 'Prepare your questions in advance to make the discussion efficient.', 'Use chat for follow-up clarification and quick doubt resolution.', 'Keep materials organized for revision before and after sessions.', ]; const StudentDashboard = () => { const { user } = useContext(AuthContext); return (
Student Workspace

Welcome back, {user?.name}

Plan sessions, stay on top of conversations, and keep your study support organized from one premium learning workspace.

Priority
Upcoming Sessions
Focus
Clear Doubts Faster
Access
Resources in One Place
{actionCards.map((card) => (
{card.icon}
{card.title}

{card.description}

))}
How to Work Effectively
{workflowItems.map((item, index) => (
{index + 1}
{item}
))}
Study Direction
Before a session: List the exact concept or problem you want resolved.
During a session: Capture key points and decisions immediately.
After a session: Revisit uploaded materials and confirm unresolved points in chat.
Consistency: Maintain a regular review schedule for stronger retention.
); }; export default StudentDashboard;
